title: Starbound
description: Build your ship, and explore the cosmos.
body:
This modpack was created for the Starbound minecraft server, but can be used separately. At Starbound, we have the aim of creating the largest space station in Valkyrien Skies History.

The pack utilizes Valkyrien Skies, Create, and Cosmic Horizon at its core, and everything is built around those three to create a fun, expansive space-exploration experience. With this modpack you can build ships and explore space, creating facilities in space or on other planets. Additionally, the pack allows for space warfare.


Copyright:
- [Music by: Sirius Beat - The Cosmos ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bkg08NvtvBU)
- [Toolbelt](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tool-belt)

- [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)

- [Drive-by-Wire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drive-by-wire)
- [Vic's Point Blank: Stellats Weaponries](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/stellats-weaponries)
- [Create Radar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-radars/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20)
- [VS Addition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vs-addition)

*There are some mods you need to grab from our discord before you can join the official server*
